description: Stable machine-consumed receipt kinds for signed audit sidecar evidence objects.

codes.summary: Receipt attesting anchoring of a signed audit commitment.
Receipt attesting import provenance for historical sealed segments.
Receipt attesting restore provenance for previously exported sealed segments.
Receipt attesting deterministic reconciliation between expected and observed audit evidence sets.
Receipt attesting a provider invocation runtime authorization outcome with digest-only request/response provenance.
Receipt attesting a denied provider invocation authorization decision as first-class evidence.
Receipt attesting canonical approval-resolution evidence including basis digests and approver identity binding when present.
Receipt attesting canonical approval-consumption linkage for production-affecting operations that consumed prior approval.
Receipt attesting canonical publication evidence for approved artifacts and linked approval decision/consumption digests.
Receipt attesting explicit override or break-glass evidence posture for policy exceptions and degraded assurance paths.
Receipt attesting secret lease issuance using digest identities for lease and binding metadata.
Receipt attesting secret lease revocation using digest identities for lease and revocation context.
Receipt attesting final runtime provenance summary including explicit no-provider/no-secret-lease outcomes.
Receipt attesting explicit degraded-posture status, trust-claim change, and acknowledgment/approval/override requirements.
Receipt attesting negative-capability outcomes and explicit support posture for absence claims across high-value categories.
Receipt attesting export of a verification evidence bundle from authoritative trusted storage.
Receipt attesting import of verification-plane evidence or trust-material into authoritative trusted storage.
Receipt attesting restore of verification evidence from archived backup material.
Receipt attesting a change to evidence retention policy settings affecting preservation posture.
Receipt attesting archival operation execution for evidence preservation lifecycle controls.
Receipt attesting trusted verifier configuration updates used by the verification plane.
Receipt attesting trusted verification trust-root updates in authoritative control-plane contracts.
Receipt attesting high-value sensitive evidence view operations on authoritative verification surfaces.
